case_title: JOSE ROSARIO RIVERA VS. PHILIP REYES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIVERA, JOSE ROSARIO AS TO DEFENDANT REYES, PHILIP AKA FELIPE REYES, AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIVERA, JOSE ROSARIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REYES, PHILIP AKA FELIPE REYES, AN INDIVIDUAL $3,301.25 PRINCIPAL, $6.80 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,513.05, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

parties.name: REYES, PHILIP, AKA FELIPE REYES, AN INDIVIDUAL

attorneys.name: LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA
attorneys.address: LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS DIVISION OF LABOR STAND, 455 GOLDEN GATE AVENUE, 10TH FLOOR EAST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, 415-703-5300
